title: eupatorium subvenosum
intro: Eupatorium subvenosum, also known as Chinese Eupatorium or Boneset, is a plant species native to Asia and North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been attributed to the presence of flavonoids and terpenoids. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving joint pain, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Eupatorium subvenosum is often prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
